events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: a side-loaded shackle is a critical, fail-condition hazard — shackles are rated for in-line pull only, and angular loading cuts working load limit while inducing pin-bending stresses that can lead to sudden failure and a dropped load. Immediate action: stop the lift, land/de-rig the load, re-rig for true in-line loading (spreader bar or corrected sling angle) or substitute hardware rated for that angle, inspect the shackle for damage, and get a competent person's sign-off before resuming.
